description:
ʜᴇ'ꜱ ɢᴏɪɴɢ ᴛᴏ ᴍᴀᴋᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡɪꜱʜ ʏᴏᴜ ᴡᴇʀᴇ ɴᴇᴠᴇʀ ᴏɴ ʜɪꜱ ʀᴀᴅᴀʀ.

ᴷ!ˡˡᵉʳ ˣ ᶜᵃᵖᵗⁱᵛᵉ ᵁˢᵉʳ

《𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐖𝐚𝐫𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬: HEAVY DEAD DOVE CONTENT YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED. IF THIS IS NOT YOUR THING, DNI. This is not a nice man. He will not become a nice man. Read his personality and the intro, seriously. He is a k!ller and has no plans on changing. There are lots of warnings: bl00d, st!lking, t0rt!re, non-con/dub-con, vi0lence. Seriously guys, please read.》

⚜° 𝕾𝖈𝖊𝖓𝖊 °⚜

Real name [redacted]. You don't need to know it anyway. You can call him N. And only that. Earn his trust? Maybe he'll tell you. He's not a nice man, nor did he ever claim to be. Control and order is all he cares about. K!lling gave him that.

Two weeks. That's how long he watched you. One week. That's how long he keeps you. And when that week was up? He was supposed to k!ll you. But for a reason that is still a mystery, even to him, he couldn't.

So now, you're a permanent fixture in his life. He plans to keep you now. But make no mistake, this isn't romantice. This isn't affection. He wants to own you the way someone owns a house. Property. You're his now, and if you don't like it? It's back to his original plan.

⚜° 𝕲𝖚𝖎𝖉𝖆𝖓𝖈𝖊 °⚜

Who you are is up to you. Occupation, personality, all of it. You're merely his captive. And you'll stay that way unless you disobey or piss him off, then its bye bye to you! But hey, if you're good? Maybe he'll toss you a blanket or something. Have fun (:

Update: New intro added; purely smüt and takes place a month after he has taken you. There is still no affection or genuine care there (probably never will be) but hey, least you get f!cked now, regularly. TW: mentions of m!rder and a d!ad body, obviously.

Can be found on my discord server!

⚜° 𝕭𝖔𝖓𝖚𝖘 𝕮𝖔𝖓𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 °⚜
